pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Kotlin compiler and standard library from 1.3.61 to 1.9.22 to support modern language features and JDK 17.
Remove the Spring Boot starter web dependency as the project migrates away from the Spring framework.
Remove the Spring Kotlin compiler plugin configuration since Spring is no longer used.
Remove the custom OIDC support library dependency which was likely tied to the Spring stack.
Add Ktor client Apache JVM dependency to replace Spring's RestTemplate/WebClient for HTTP calls.
Add Ktor content negotiation dependency to handle HTTP request/response body serialization.
Add Ktor Jackson serialization dependency to integrate Jackson with Ktor for JSON handling.
Add Ktor serialization Jackson dependency to provide the Jackson serializer implementation for Ktor.

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Replace Spring RestTemplate with Ktor HttpClient to modernize the HTTP stack and support coroutines.
src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.human_impl: import io.ktor.client.*; val httpClient: HttpClient = HttpClient(Apache) { ... }

src/main/kotlin/no/nav/arbeidsgiver/alti.general_idea: Add Ktor client, Apache engine, content negotiation, and Jackson serialization dependencies.
Wrap synchronous HTTP calls in runBlocking to adapt to Ktor's asynchronous API.
Implement custom response validation in Ktor to parse proxy errors and handle fallback logic.
Change method signatures to accept explicit Token and Subject instead of relying on Spring context.
